revision.comment: /* top */Add |id= parameter
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:bump-01-18]]
}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:bump-01-18]]
[[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]]
}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings

                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}

        }} redirects]]

[[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]]

}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling

  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->

                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from misspelling
  |name=From a misspelling
  |from=a misspelling or [[typographical error]]
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<bdi>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</bdi>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]].  Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.  
** This template tags redirects with a subcategory of the {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}} category, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from misspellings
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}

[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
